data.title: Perplexity AI Advocates for TikTok Takeover as Company Eyes $18 Billion Valuation
data.description:
The company said it was “singularly positioned to rebuild the TikTok algorithm" in a blog post that appeared shortly after news reports that it was looking to raise a potential $1 billion.
source: https://decrypt.co/311133/perplexity-advocates-for-tiktok-eyes-18-billion-valuation

data.title: DeFi should feel ‘magical’ for average consumers, says Coinbase product director behind new bitcoin-backed loans
data.description:
Coinbase Product Director Michael Riani explains how that the goal of Coinbase's new bitcoin-backed loans is to make DeFi more accessible for everyday consumers.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/347558/coinbase-bitcoin-backed-loans?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Ripple’s Legal Victory: XRP Stagnates, Whales Sell Off
data.description:
Despite Ripple's legal victory against the SEC, XRP is not taking off. Whales sell millions of tokens, signalling uncertainty in the market.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/trading/ripples-legal-victory-xrp-stagnates-whales-sell-off/

data.title: President Donald Trump Says Stablecoins ‘Will Help Expand the Dominance of the US Dollar’
data.description:
US President Donald Trump is optimistic that dollar-backed stablecoins will help maintain the US dollar as the leading currency in the world..
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/21/president-donald-trump-says-stablecoins-will-help-expand-the-dominance-of-the-us-dollar/

data.title: 15% discount and 17% yield boost made Strategy STRF sale ‘upsized’
data.description:
Although dividend and liquidation preference numbers for Strategy’s STRF appear unchanged, initial buyers are getting a de facto discount..

data.title: Fidelity Solana Fund Registered in Delaware
data.description: According to BlockBeats, market reports indicate that the Fidelity Solana Fund has been officially registered in Delaware, USA.

data.title: Breaking! Coinbase in Talks to Acquire Deribit
data.description:
TL;DR Coinbase is in advanced talks to acquire Deribit, the leading cryptocurrency derivatives platform, specializing in Bitcoin and Ethereum options. Deribit, based in the Netherlands, reached a trading volume close to $1.2 trillion in 2024, leading the cryptocurrency options market. The deal could represent one of the most significant acquisitions in the recent history of ... 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/breaking-coinbase-in-talks-to-acquire-deribit/

data.title: RWA restaking platform Zoth reports $8.4 million security breach
data.description:
Zoth, a decentralized RWA protocol has taken to X, formerly Twitter, to announce that its system experienced a security breach.  According to reports, the hacker got away with over $8 million, mostly in stablecoin which was quickly converted to DAI. The hack seems to have first been reported by a user on X who provided […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/zoth-reports-security-breach/

data.title: Insider Wallet Moves $1.87 Million MELANIA Meme Coin
data.description:
An insider wallet holding 50 million MELANIA tokens—5% of the meme coin’s total supply—recently transferred $1.87 Million worth to a new address. The move coincides with the end of month 2 in MELANIA’s vesting schedule. It is a critical moment for the volatile token tied to Melania Trump
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/21/insider-wallet-moves-1-87-million-melania-meme-coin/
